ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was introduced */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the engine type */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transmission type */,
  "production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year production of the model started */,
  "production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year production of the model ended */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., Sedan, SUV) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type (e.g., FWD, RWD, AWD) */,
  "vehicle_weight" REAL /* Weight of the vehicle in pounds */,
  "vehicle_length" REAL /* Length of the vehicle in inches */,
  "vehicle_width" REAL /* Width of the vehicle in inches */,
  "vehicle_height" REAL /* Height of the vehicle in inches */,
  "cargo_capacity" REAL /* Cargo capacity of the vehicle in cubic feet */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the vehicle */,
  "safety_rating" INTEGER /* Safety rating of the vehicle (1-5) */,
  "emission_rating" TEXT /* Emission rating of the vehicle (1-5) */,
  "vehicle_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each vehicle model */,
  "vehicle_description" REAL /* Detailed description of the vehicle model */,
  "vehicle_price" TEXT /* Base price of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the vehicle price is denominated */,
  "vehicle_status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle model (e.g., Active, Discontinued) */,
  "vehicle_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the vehicle model */,
  "vehicle_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video of the vehicle model */,
  "vehicle_launch_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was launched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES engines ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_website" TEXT /* Official website of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "manufacturer_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the manufacturer's logo */,
  "manufacturer_currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used by the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_language" TEXT /* Primary language used by the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name or model of the engine */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Displacement of the engine in cubic inches */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "torque" REAL /* Torque of the engine in foot-pounds */,
  "engine_weight" REAL /* Weight of the engine in pounds */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of the engine (e.g., V8, Inline-4) */,
  "engine_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the engine */,
  "engine_production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year production of the engine started */,
  "engine_production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year production of the engine ended */,
  "engine_price" REAL /* Price of the engine */,
  "engine_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the engine price is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission */,
  "transmission_name" TEXT /* Name or model of the transmission */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of the transmission (e.g., Automatic, Manual) */,
  "gear_count" INTEGER /* Number of gears */,
  "transmission_weight" REAL /* Weight of the transmission in pounds */,
  "transmission_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transmission */,
  "transmission_production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year production of the transmission started */,
  "transmission_production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year production of the transmission ended */,
  "transmission_price" REAL /* Price of the transmission */,
  "transmission_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the transmission price is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the performance metrics belong to */,
  "mpg_city" REAL /* Miles per gallon in city driving */,
  "mpg_highway" REAL /* Miles per gallon in highway driving */,
  "acceleration_0_to_60" REAL /* Time to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph in seconds */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed of the vehicle in mph */,
  "braking_distance_60_to_0" REAL /* Braking distance from 60 mph to 0 mph in feet */,
  "performance_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the performance metrics */,
  "performance_tested_by" TEXT /* Entity or organization that tested the performance metrics */,
  "performance_test_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metrics were tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_performance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the feature is available in */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_price" REAL /* Price of the feature in USD */,
  "feature_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the feature price is denominated */,
  "feature_availability" TEXT /* Availability of the feature (e.g., Standard, Optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_features_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the model record belongs to */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the model */,
  "model_changes" TEXT /* Changes or updates made to the model */,
  "production_volume" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles produced in the model year */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles sold in the model year */,
  "market_share" REAL /* Market share of the vehicle in the model year */,
  "model_launch_date" TEXT /* Date the model was launched */,
  "model_discontinuation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was discontinued */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., Active, Discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_models_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_sales" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sales_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of vehicles sold */,
  "sales_price" REAL /* Price of the sale in USD */,
  "sales_region" TEXT /* Region where the sale took place */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made (e.g., Dealership, Online) */,
  "sales_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the sale was made */,
  "sales_tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  "sales_discount" REAL /* Discount amount for the sale */,
  "sales_currency_exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the vehicle (1-5) */,
  "review_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is verified */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., Customer, Expert) */,
  "review_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_review_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, marketer, sales) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "user_language" TEXT /* Primary language of the user */,
  "user_currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used by the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle involved in the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of the incident (e.g., accident, recall) */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "recall_status" TEXT /* Status of the recall (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "recall_date" TEXT /* Date the recall was issued */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Location where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the incident (1-5) */,
  "incident_affected_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles affected by the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_incidents_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "vehicle_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first vehicle in the comparison */,
  "vehicle_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second vehicle in the comparison */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date of the comparison */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of the comparison (e.g., performance, safety) */,
  "comparison_score" REAL /* Score of the comparison (1-10) */,
  "comparison_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the comparison */,
  "comparison_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the comparison score is denominated */,
  "comparison_source" TEXT /* Source of the comparison (e.g., Internal, External) */,
  "comparison_method" TEXT /* Method used for the comparison (e.g., Test Drive, Simulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_comparisons_vehicle_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id_2") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_comparisons_vehicle_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id_1") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
